anti_claim: This registry validates public standard file presence and schema shape. It authorizes only bounded public Lean/Lake witness receipts, synthetic prediction reconciliation receipts, and evidence-cell metadata receipts. Standard counts and first-wave-required rows are inventory fields only; they are not completeness, readiness, maturity, score-based progress, release, publication, provider, secret-export, theorem-correctness, whole-system-correctness, or standards-registry source authority.
